'''tajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puffily|puffily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puffily|puffily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tajate|tajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tajatesher|tajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajatesherĂ«m|tajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tajatero|tajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tajateshĂ«|tajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajateshĂ«m|tajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitajatero|gokitajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitajateshĂ«|gokitajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajateshĂ«m|gokitajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotajankerom|gotajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotajankeshĂ«|gotajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajankeshĂ«m|gotajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotajankeya|gotajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tajaterom|tajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajatemu|tajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tajateya|tajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitajaterom|gokitajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajatemu|gokitajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitajateya|gokitajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tajajate|tajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tajajatesher|tajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajajatesherĂ«m|tajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tajajatero|tajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tajajateshĂ«|tajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajajateshĂ«m|tajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitajajatero|gokitajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitajajateshĂ«|gokitajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajajateshĂ«m|gokitajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotajajankerom|gotajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotajajankeshĂ«|gotajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajajankeshĂ«m|gotajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotajajankeya|gotajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tajajaterom|tajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajajatemu|tajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tajajateya|tajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitajajaterom|gokitajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajajatemu|gokitajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitajajateya|gokitajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠte|tĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠtesher|tĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠtero|tĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠtero|gokitĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠterom|tĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠtemu|tĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠteya|tĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠterom|gokitĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠjĂŠteya|gokitĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafjafte|tafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafjaftesher|tafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafjaftesherĂ«m|tafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafjaftero|tafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafjafteshĂ«|tafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafjafteshĂ«m|tafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafjaftero|gokitafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafjafteshĂ«|gokitafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafjafteshĂ«m|gokitafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafjafnkerom|gotafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafjafnkeshĂ«|gotafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafjafnkeshĂ«m|gotafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafjafnkeya|gotafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafjafterom|tafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafjaftemu|tafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafjafteya|tafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafjafterom|gokitafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafjaftemu|gokitafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafjafteya|gokitafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
